ItacAcademyItem.Name: Intrigati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: On both Accademia degli Intricati in Venice, and Paolo Veraldo, see Maylender, vol. III, p. 347, and Franchi, Impressioni sceniche, pp. 505-6. Publications related to the hsitory of this Academy, but not in British Library collections, include: L` intrico, et torti intricati comedia del sig. Paulo Veraldo romano. Detto lo Svegliato nell`Academia dell`Intricati di Venetia, da loro rapresentata l`anno 1606. Al molto illust. ... Valerio Bontempo (In Venetia: appresso Alessandro Vecchi, 1610).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
